title: Coloring subitems
excerpt: Is there any way to color subitems? If not, I would like to request it as a new feature. They should be able to be colored based on subitem column values.

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to color subitems? If not, I would like to request it as a new feature. They should be able to be colored based on subitem column values.
